title: alchemilla vulgaris subvar. semisecta
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. semisecta, also known as the lady's mantle, is a variety of the lady's mantle plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. semisecta include soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
